allow: PowerShell(python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\('pomodoro.py', doraise=True\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
PowerShell(Start-Process python -ArgumentList "pomodoro.py" -WindowStyle Normal -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Output "Process launched")
PowerShell(& "C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe" auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol ssh --web 2>&1)
